summary.zh: 让滑动距离映射到位移与透明度，并在阈值前提供阻尼。
summary.en: Map swipe distance to travel and opacity with resistance before the threshold.

definition.zh: 把元素拖出屏幕以关闭它，例如抽屉或提示消息。
definition.en: A directional drag removes a surface after distance or velocity crosses a dismissal threshold.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制元素移动的空间距离。
description.en: Controls how far the element travels.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 把滑动距离映射到位移和透明度，让用户可预判关闭结果。
purpose.en: Map swipe distance to travel and opacity so the dismissal outcome stays predictable.

frequency.zh: 适合中频通知、抽屉或单项操作；核心信息必须提供按钮替代。
frequency.en: Use for medium-frequency notifications, drawers, or item actions, with a button alternative for essential content.

trigger.zh: 由水平或垂直拖拽超过启动阈值触发，并先锁定主轴。
trigger.en: Trigger after drag crosses an activation threshold, locking to the primary axis first.

enterExit.zh: 阈值前使用阻尼跟手，越过阈值后离场；未达到阈值则回弹原位。
enterExit.en: Track with resistance before the threshold, exit after crossing it, and spring back when the threshold is missed.

interruptibility.zh: 反向拖动立即改变进度；pointercancel 使用当前位置决定回弹。
interruptibility.en: Reverse progress immediately with drag direction, using current position to settle after pointercancel.

gestureRules.zh: 避免与页面滚动轴冲突，设置 touch-action，并提供撤销或显式关闭按钮。
gestureRules.en: Avoid conflicts with page scrolling through touch-action, and provide undo or an explicit close button.

reducedMotion.zh: 使用静态关闭按钮与即时移除，保留撤销反馈；取消大幅滑出。
reducedMotion.en: Use a static close button and immediate removal with undo feedback, removing large off-screen travel.

reviewNotes.zh: 区分滑动关闭与橡皮筋回弹的交互目标。
reviewNotes.en: Distinguish dismissal from rubber-band boundary feedback.

reviewNotes.zh: 测试慢拖、快甩、短距离和取消路径。
reviewNotes.en: Test slow drag, fast flick, short travel, and cancellation paths.
